Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I thought I told you not to come back here... Hmph, damn kids...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Well, I don't care as long as you don't get on my nerves. Have a seat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_001_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I came to see you, old man.

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}...Quit jokin' around, kid. Heh, that's a good one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 13 17 15 114}Ha, you're absolutely right! It ain't any of my business![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}But watch your mouth, kid. I am your elder after all...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}If you were my son, I'd give you a swift kick in the ass.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 114 0 25 25}You don't have to revere me, but at least show some proper respect.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 13 17 5 114}Mutatsu... That's my Buddhist name, not my real one, of course.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Hmph, you're not too bright are ya, kid? This is just one of those things you gotta learn on your own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}If you're gonna address me, call me by my Buddhist name, Mutatsu.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}The world's not a forgiving place, kid. You gotta show other people respect.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was lectured by Mutatsu...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense the kindness[n]behind his harsh words.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I understand[n]Mutatsu a little better now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: Unused label.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Well, I don't really care what happens to somebody else's kid, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}...Go home already, will ya? And this time, don't come back again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I said goodbye to Mutatsu[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
